overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long HUT Daily ETF (HUTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Hut 8 Corp. (Nasdaq: HUT) stock, less fees, and expenses HUTG was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
